typecheck.command: cd "/Users/albertonunez/Documents/Windsurf/BurnBar" && xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `.factory/skills/operator-ui-worker/SKILL.md` daemon command filters to match `.factory/services.yaml` (`BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests`) so worker validation commands do not false-green with zero matched tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `m2-authoring-ui-surface` found transcript command drift (`OpenBurnBarMissionControlServiceTests` vs `BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests`) and documented a no-match filtered run.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a handoff invariant requiring recorded `commitId` values to be resolvable (`git rev-parse --verify`) before worker completion to preserve auditability for downstream reviewers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `m2-authoring-ui-surface` found handoff commit SHA `d411f91fbf9fc0bc55f88ef9a30c90aad2e4c2b8` was not resolvable via git while the actual reviewed commit was `d411f91f22ca63e70928fb3d33a053fcb987bb80`.
